text: AI is changing the way we think about creativity. Today, computers can create original paintings, compose music, and even write stories or poems. AI-generated art uses algorithms to produce images based on descriptions, while AI music programs can mimic the styles of famous composers. In writing, AI tools can help generate articles, scripts, and stories. However, many people argue that human creativity is different. Machines follow patterns and data, while humans draw from emotions, experiences, and intuition. AI can imitate creativity, but it may lack the deeper meaning and personal touch that only a human can provide. The future will likely involve both working together.
